prompt: Act as a Staff-level Frontend Engineer designing the internal architecture of a professional interactive visual editor. Before implementing the SeatMapBuilder editor, redesign the solution using an Editor Engine approach similar to professional layout tools such as Seats.io...
notes: Complete architecture plan with layered engine approach (Domain, Engine, Renderer, UI). Key decisions: Konva.js for rendering, light MUI theme, arc/curve support from start. Designed tool FSM system, spatial hash grid, snap/guidelines engines.

prompt: Implement the plan - full SeatMapBuilder editor with Domain Layer, Engine (events, state, tools, systems, commands, input), Renderer (Konva), Store (Zustand bridge), and UI (MUI components).
notes: Beginning implementation of all 7 phases from architecture plan.

prompt: add a pan navegation tool, add shortcut for that. (space + drag)
notes: Added PanTool class (src/engine/tools/PanTool.ts) with grab/grabbing cursor, registered in EditorShell, added toolbar button with PanTool icon. Implemented Space+drag temporary pan mode in InputManager via keydown/keyup listeners. Added H keyboard shortcut to activate pan tool. Space+drag works from any active tool as a temporary modifier.

prompt: Implement real-time area selection (drag selection) for selecting multiple elements inside the editor canvas.
notes: Connected the existing but broken box-select system. Added boxselect:update and boxselect:end events to EditorEventMap. Fixed SelectionTool to emit these events during box-selecting state, with real-time spatial queries for live element highlighting. Fixed getBoxSelectRect() bug (always returned null). Wired KonvaRenderer to subscribe to new events and drive SelectionLayer showBoxSelect/hideBoxSelect. Added cancel support with boxselect:end emission.

prompt: Implement the plan: Real-Time Element Repositioning During Drag - emit elements:updated during drag preview in SelectionTool.onPointerMove so Konva nodes reposition visually in real-time
notes: Added elements:updated emission in the dragging case of onPointerMove and in the cancel handler. Collected updated/reverted MapElement arrays and emitted them alongside render:request. Build passes cleanly.

prompt: Implement the following plan: Row-Aware Selection and Dragging - Add expandSelectionWithRows() helper to SelectionTool, apply row expansion in onPointerDown, onPointerMove box-selecting, and onPointerUp box-selecting
notes: Added expandSelectionWithRows() private method to SelectionTool that expands selection to include full rows (all sibling seats + row entity) when any seat in a row is selected. Applied the expansion in three places: click selection (onPointerDown), real-time box selection (onPointerMove), and box selection finalization (onPointerUp). Build passes cleanly.

prompt: Implement the following plan: Seats.io-Style Visual Overhaul - update seat rendering to outlined circles, reduce default seat size/spacing, whiten canvas, refine area/table/row rendering, update preview ghosts and selection highlights
notes: Applied visual overhaul across 8 files: SeatShape (white fill + colored stroke), constraints (radius 8, spacing 22), CanvasHost (white bg), AreaShape (solid border, centered label, rounded corners), TableShape (lighter browns, smaller label), RowShape (lighter/smaller text), PreviewLayer (outlined ghost style), SelectionLayer (brighter blue, subtler fill). Build passes.

prompt: Implement the following plan: Minimalist Selection System & Seat Visual Overhaul - colored seat fills, element-level selection visuals, single group bounding box, minimal drag-select rectangle
notes: Modified SeatShape (colored fill at 35% opacity + selection helpers), AreaShape (selection helpers), TableShape (selection helpers), rewrote SelectionLayer (element-level visuals + single group bounding box + minimal drag-select), updated KonvaRenderer to pass elementLayer to updateSelection calls. Build passes clean.

prompt: Implement the following plan: Light-Blue Selection + Row Handles & Shadow - unified light-blue selection colors for all element types, row shadow bands behind selected rows, extension handles at row ends, drag-to-extend with preview seats, and ExtendRowCommand for undo support.
notes: Implemented unified light-blue selection colors in SeatShape, AreaShape, TableShape. Added row shadow rects and extension handles to SelectionLayer with handlePositions exposure. Created ExtendRowCommand for undoable row extension. Added extending-row state to SelectionTool with mathematical handle hit-testing, preview seat generation during drag, and seat creation on release. Build passes with no errors.

prompt: Update the editor behavior and UI: Remove floating row letter, add rotation controls in UI, add row curving feature with Ctrl+Click modifier, decrease seat spacing
notes: 1) Removed floating Konva.Text row label from RowShape.ts (label remains in data model and properties panel). 2) Added rotation (degrees) input to PropertiesPanel for all element types; rows rotate all child seats together via RotateElementsCommand. 3) Added curveRadius field to Row type, CurveRowCommand, curve handle in SelectionLayer (orange dot at row midpoint), and curving-row interaction state in SelectionTool with arc seat repositioning using sagitta/chord geometry. 4) Decreased DEFAULT_SEAT_SPACING from 22 to 18.

prompt: When you curve a row, the background shadow must curve too. Also, add a control to rotate an element.
notes: 1) Added arcFromSagitta() shared helper in utils/math.ts for arc geometry. 2) SelectionLayer now draws curved arc-band shadow (Konva.Shape with custom sceneFunc) when row.curveRadius \!== 0, falls back to Konva.Rect for straight rows. 3) Added green rotation handle (circle + line) above any selected element in SelectionLayer. 4) Added rotating state in SelectionTool: drag the rotation handle to rotate element(s) around their center with live preview, commits via RotateElementsCommand on release. For rows, all child seats rotate together and orientationAngle is updated.

prompt: Add the option in the right sidebar to change the label, the category, and the price of a row
notes: Added category (RowCategory type) and price (number) fields to Row interface in types.ts. Added default values in RowGroupingSystem.detectRow(). Added Category dropdown and Price number input to RowProperties in PropertiesPanel.tsx. Label editing already existed.

prompt: Implement the following plan: Fix: Row selection should show row properties in the right sidebar
notes: Modified selection:changed handler in engineBridge.ts to detect when selection is a row + its child seats and treat it as a single row selection, so the PropertiesPanel shows row properties instead of multi-selection message.

prompt: Implement plan: Fix selection area should match element bounds - hitTest() uses radius query without checking if click is inside element bounds
notes: Added pointInElement() helper to EditorEngine.ts that checks point-in-shape for each element type (seat circle, row/area bounds rect, table round/rectangular). Updated hitTest() to filter candidates through pointInElement before picking closest.

prompt: Implement the following plan: Fix: Precise element selection & row shadow hiding during editing
notes: Fixed row hit-testing in pointInElement() to check individual seat circles instead of AABB. Added toolState parameter to SelectionLayer.updateSelection() to hide row shadows during rotating/curving/extending. Updated KonvaRenderer to pass tool state and subscribe to tool:state-changed event.

prompt: Fix box selection selecting rows via oversized AABB - when drawing a selection box near a diagonal row but not touching any seats, the row should not be selected
notes: Added rectIntersectsElement() and circleIntersectsRect() methods to SelectionTool. Updated both box-select filter paths (onPointerMove and onPointerUp) to do precise geometry checks: for rows, checks if any seat circle intersects the selection rect; for other elements, does proper AABB intersection.

prompt: Implement the following plan: Fix: Drag selected elements by clicking inside selection bounding box
notes: Added isPointInSelectionBounds() helper method and else-if branch in onPointerDown() so clicking inside the selection bounding box (but between seats) initiates a drag instead of clearing the selection and starting box-select.

prompt: add a confirm dialog before delete a element/elements
notes: Added a ConfirmDeleteDialog component using MUI Dialog. Modified SelectionTool to emit a delete:confirm event instead of deleting directly. The dialog shows element count, has Cancel/Delete buttons, and reminds users they can undo with Ctrl+Z. Wired into EditorShell alongside the existing ExportDialog.

prompt: Implement the following plan: Seat Category System — Planta1, Planta2, VIP. Replace existing 4-category system with new 3-category system.
notes: Replaced SeatCategory/RowCategory types (standard/vip/premium/accessible → planta1/planta2/vip), updated CATEGORY_COLORS (planta1=#2196F3, planta2=#4CAF50, vip=#FFD700), changed defaults from standard to planta1 in PlacementSystem/TableTool/RowGroupingSystem, updated PropertiesPanel dropdowns, removed Rotation/Radius/Spacing/SeatOrder/Seats fields from sidebar. Build passes.

prompt: the sidebar inputs properties dont let me change the values
notes: Added elements:updated event listener in engineBridge.ts. The store selectedElementData was a stale snapshot that never refreshed after UpdatePropertiesCommand executed. Now the bridge syncs updated element data back to the store so inputs reflect changes.

prompt: the sidebar inputs properties dont let me change the values — new values are not reflected on the element
notes: Fixed 4 issues: (1) Row category changes now propagate to child seats via handleCategoryChange in RowProperties, (2) propagateLabel now emits elements:updated so canvas redraws seat labels, (3) applySeatSelection changed to only modify stroke instead of replacing fill so category colors stay visible while selected, (4) updateSeatShape now updates label fill color on category change.

prompt: Implement the following plan: Multi-Selection Bulk Category Editing + Color Swatches - Add MultiSelectionCategoryEditor to PropertiesPanel, add color swatches to all Category dropdowns, extract shared category options
notes: Implemented bulk category editing for multi-selected seats/rows in PropertiesPanel. Added CategoryMenuItems component with color swatches using categoryColor(). Extracted CATEGORY_OPTIONS constant. Multi-select detects if all elements are seats/rows and shows category dropdown; mixed selections show only count. Build passes.

prompt: now the row/seat categories doesnt work
notes: Fixed CategoryMenuItems component issue. MUI Select requires MenuItem as direct children (uses React.Children). Changed from a wrapper component returning Fragment to a plain function returning an array of MenuItems.

prompt: Implement Mixed Categories Indeterminate State for Multi-Selection - show colored dots + Mixed Categories text when selected elements have different categories
notes: Added uniqueCategories to multiSelectInfo useMemo, added renderValue prop to multi-selection Select that shows color swatch+label for common category or multi-color dots + Mixed Categories text for mixed state. Build passes.

prompt: Fix the input floating label bug - Category label overlaps Mixed Categories content
notes: Added shrink prop to InputLabel in the multi-selection FormControl so the label stays floated above the field even when the Select value is empty (mixed state).

prompt: Fix: after changing category of mixed-category elements, the Select input doesnt update to show the selected option
notes: Added a bulkVersion state counter that increments after bulk category change and is included as a useMemo dependency for multiSelectInfo, forcing it to recompute and reflect the new common category.

prompt: remove the label from row properties, but stay the row label property
notes: Removed the generic Label TextField from the main properties panel that appeared for all element types, while keeping the Row Label TextField inside the RowProperties component.

prompt: Feature: Dynamic Row Scaling via Endpoints - Refine the interaction of the row endpoints (edge handles) to support both adding and removing seats through dragging: Expansion (dragging outward adds seats), Contraction (dragging inward removes seats), Visual Feedback (real-time preview), Minimum Limit (cannot shrink below 1 seat). Step snapping and directional logic for left/right handles.
notes: Implemented ContractRowCommand for undoable seat removal. Modified SelectionTool extending-row state to handle negative projection (inward drag) for contraction with step snapping. Added preview:contraction event and ElementLayer dimming for visual feedback during contraction drag. Min 1 seat enforced.

prompt: Feature: State Serialization (JSON Import/Export) - Implement New Map, Export to JSON (file download), Import from JSON (file upload + paste), data integrity round-trip, and empty state support for the SeatMapBuilder.
notes: Created src/domain/serialization.ts with serialize/deserialize utilities (schemaVersion support, Map↔Array conversion). Added resetState() and loadLayout() methods to EditorEngine. Added layout:loaded event to events.ts and subscribed in KonvaRenderer + engineBridge for full renderer sync. Enhanced ExportDialog with file download button. Created ImportDialog with file upload and paste JSON tabs. Updated EditorShell with New Map (with confirmation), Import, and Export icon buttons.

prompt: Implement the following plan: Fix Curved Row Interaction: Additive Curvature & Curve-Aware Extension
notes: Fixed two bugs: (1) Added curveOriginalRadius field to SelectionTool so re-editing a curved row adds to existing curvature instead of resetting. (2) Added getCurvedRowTangents() helper and updated hitTestHandles, showHandles, onPointerMove extending-row, and onPointerUp extending-row to place new seats along arc continuation and position handles along arc tangent for curved rows.

prompt: when i expand or contract a curved row, the shadow and the curve need to be recalculated
notes: Updated ExtendRowCommand and ContractRowCommand to recalculate curveRadius (sagitta) when the chord changes after adding/removing seats. Uses arcFromSagitta to get the original arc radius, then derives new sagitta from formula: sign * (R - sqrt(R² - (newChord/2)²)). This ensures the shadow and curve handle match the actual seat positions after extension/contraction.

prompt: the expand case works well, but when reduces the length of seat, the shadow and curve is broken
notes: Fixed ContractRowCommand: moved arc geometry computation (arcFromSagitta + new sagitta calculation) BEFORE removeElements() call. Previously, when contracting from the left side, the original first seat was already removed before we tried to look it up for arc computation, causing the recalculation to be skipped and curveRadius to stay stale.

prompt: works well, but when i expand the seats, the seats dont respect the spacing of the original row
notes: Fixed angular step calculation for curved row extension. Was using row.spacing/arc.radius which gives wrong angular step. Now uses arc.angleDiff/(seatCount-1) to match the actual angular spacing between existing seats. Also introduced effectiveSpacing (arc length per seat = radius * |angleDiff| / (n-1)) for seat count calculation and contraction thresholds in both onPointerMove and onPointerUp.

prompt: Implement the plan: Clamp Row Curvature to Prevent Flipping - prevent arc from exceeding semicircle when dragging curve handle
notes: Added sagitta clamping (95% of chord/2) in 4 locations: onPointerMove and onPointerUp curving-row handlers in SelectionTool.ts, hitTestCurveHandle in SelectionTool.ts, and showCurveHandle in SelectionLayer.ts. All use maxSagitta = (chord/2)*0.95 to prevent arc from exceeding ~171 degrees.

prompt: Implement the Real-Time Table Placement Preview & Snap Guidelines plan: add preview:table event, emit ghost preview data from TableTool on pointer move, render ghost table + seats + label in PreviewLayer, subscribe in KonvaRenderer.
notes: Added preview:table event to EditorEventMap, updated TableTool.onPointerMove to emit ghost preview data and cancel/onDeactivate to emit preview:clear, added showTablePreview() to PreviewLayer rendering ghost table circle + seats + label, subscribed to preview:table in KonvaRenderer.subscribeToEvents().

prompt: Feature: Two-Axis Multi-Row Creation Tool - Implement a Grid Generator tool for rapid map population with two-step Width x Height selection, angular placement, dynamic ghost preview, row independence, default Planta1 category, and JSON export/import compatibility.
notes: Implemented GridTool (src/engine/tools/GridTool.ts) with three-click interaction: origin → width+angle → height. Created PlaceGridCommand for atomic undo/redo. Added showGridPreview to PreviewLayer with ghost seats and angle indicator. Registered tool in EditorShell, added toolbar button (GridViewIcon), G keyboard shortcut, and preview:grid event wiring. All rows are independent entities with planta1 category and sequential Row A/B/C labeling.

prompt: Bug Fix: Grid Generator Preview Synchronization - Fix preview layer for Multi-Row Generation tool: coordinate synchronization, state vs preview separation, anchor point consistency, visual feedback with floating tooltip near cursor, and guideline integration during preview phase.
notes: Fixed 6 bugs: (1) Inverted perpendicular direction - rows now extend toward the mouse instead of away. (2) Missing snap/guideline integration in updateGridPreview height phase. (3) Tooltip repositioned from fixed anchor offset to floating near cursor via new cursorPoint field in preview:grid event. (4) Added row separator dashed lines between adjacent rows for visual distinction. (5) Replaced destroy/recreate-per-frame with Konva node pooling for high-performance preview rendering. (6) Extracted shared generateGrid() method used by both preview and commit to guarantee WYSIWYG coordinate identity.

prompt: Implement the following plan: Real-Time Visual Preview for Area Drawing Tool - Add preview:area event, showAreaPreview() to PreviewLayer, enhance AreaTool with snap and preview emission, wire event in KonvaRenderer
notes: Implemented real-time visual preview for the Area Drawing tool: added preview:area event type in events.ts, created showAreaPreview() method in PreviewLayer with pooled ghost rect/label/tooltip nodes, enhanced AreaTool with snap logic on start/move/end points plus guidelines and preview emission, wired the new event in KonvaRenderer. Build passes with no type errors.

prompt: Implement the following plan: Area Property Inspector — Label Customization. Add a label TextField to AreaProperties in PropertiesPanel.tsx above the color picker, with validation preventing empty labels.
notes: Added Label TextField to AreaProperties component in PropertiesPanel.tsx. The field reads data.label, updates via onChange("label", value), prevents empty values, and shows MUI error state. Build passes successfully.

prompt: Bug Fix: Flexible Label Editing in Property Sidebar. Resolve the issue where the default Area or A prefix cannot be fully deleted. Requirements: unrestricted editing, placeholder logic, state update on blur with fallback, and text selection on focus.
notes: Refactored AreaProperties label TextField to use local state (useState) for unrestricted editing. Removed the onChange guard that blocked empty values. Added placeholder, onBlur validation with fallback to last valid label, onFocus auto-select via inputRef, and useEffect to sync with external data changes (undo/redo).

prompt: Feature: Border-Only Selection State for Area Entities. Refine visual feedback so selected areas keep their fill color unchanged and show a dashed blue border instead.
notes: Modified applyAreaSelection in AreaShape.ts to stop changing fill color. Selection now uses a #1A73E8 dashed stroke (2.5px, dash [6,3]) for border-only indication. clearAreaSelection resets stroke and disables dash. Existing event flow (selection:changed → SelectionLayer → applyAreaSelection) ensures instant apply/remove.

prompt: Implement the following plan: Transform Handles for Rectangular Areas - Add resize corner handles to Area elements with drag-to-resize, minimum size constraints, and undo/redo support
notes: Implemented resize handles for Area elements: (1) Extended ResizeElementCommand to also update transform.position, (2) Added resize handle visuals (4 corner squares) to SelectionLayer with showResizeHandles/clearResizeHandles/getResizeHandlePositions, (3) Added resizing-area interaction state to SelectionTool with hit testing, drag logic, min size enforcement (10x10), and commit via ResizeElementCommand, (4) Fixed existing TransformSystem.resize call to match new constructor signature. Build passes.

prompt: Implement the following plan: Fix Row Selection Shadow Broken After Undo/Redo of Rotation - expand RotateElementsCommand to save/restore orientationAngle and bounds, update applyRotation to set orientationAngle for rows, remove redundant orientationAngle update from SelectionTool.ts
notes: Modified RotateElementsCommand.ts to save/restore orientationAngle (for rows) and bounds in oldTransforms, update orientationAngle in applyRotation, and restore both in undo. Removed redundant orientationAngle update from SelectionTool.ts lines 522-529. Build passes successfully.

prompt: Implement table improvements: smaller size, unified selection, drag-to-place, category editing
notes: Added tableId to Seat and category to Table interfaces. Reduced table radius from 60 to 32. Implemented expandSelectionWithTables for unified table+seats selection. Changed table placement from click to mouse-release. Added table group detection in engineBridge. Updated TableProperties panel with label and category editing that propagates to child seats. Updated rotation handling for tables.

prompt: Update table seating groups so users can change seat category via multi-selection, with mixed category detection and propagation to child seats
notes: Extended multiSelectInfo in PropertiesPanel to recognize table types alongside seats and rows. Updated category detection to read from parent groups (tables/rows) and skip child seats already covered. Updated handleBulkCategoryChange to handle tables by updating the table category and propagating to all child seats, with dedup tracking via updatedSeatIds set. Mixed categories across tables correctly show Mixed Categories indicator.

prompt: Implement the following plan: Fix Category & Color Change Undo/Redo - Three issues: bulk category changes bypass commands, row/table category changes dont propagate children in undo, area color picker floods undo stack
notes: Created ChangeCategoryCommand that snapshots all affected elements (parents + propagated children) for atomic undo/redo. Updated PropertiesPanel: bulk/row/table category handlers now use ChangeCategoryCommand via engine.history.execute(). Area color picker now uses local state with live preview during drag and commits a single UpdatePropertiesCommand on blur.

prompt: when i add an area, change the color and do a undo, the area is removed
notes: Fixed area color undo by replacing onBlur-based commit with a native change event listener via ref. React onChange maps to the native input event (fires continuously while dragging), but onBlur does not reliably fire when the color picker closes. The native change event fires exactly once when the user commits a color selection, so the command is now created there instead.

prompt: Replace Grid Snap with Visual-Only Alignment Guidelines - remove automatic snapping, add angled guidelines with point+angle model, update all tools to use raw positions
notes: Updated Guideline interface to throughPoint+angle model in geometry.ts. Rewrote SnapEngine to detect alignment without modifying positions, added angle-aware detection for row-aligned elements. Updated GuidelinesEngine to produce new format. Rewrote GuidelinesLayer for angled line rendering with thin pink style. Removed snap position application from SelectionTool, GridTool, SeatPlacementTool, TableTool, and AreaTool. Build passes with no errors.

prompt: Show row alignment guidelines in SelectionTool when dragging/clicking rows, matching SeatPlacementTool behavior
notes: Added showGuidelinesAtPoint helper to SelectionTool, called on mousedown in both element-hit and bounding-box-hit blocks so guidelines appear immediately on click-hold. Improved drag guideline probing to iterate all selected seats (not just first ID) for better row-angle alignment detection. Added SnapTarget/AngleSnapTarget imports. Build passes.

prompt: SelectionTool guidelines for all element types (rows, seats, tables, any selectable object) on click-hold and drag
notes: Verified existing implementation already covers this requirement. showGuidelinesAtPoint called on mousedown for immediate display. Drag probing iterates all selected elements without type filtering. Guidelines clear on mouseUp. Build passes.

prompt: Fix guidelines not showing when dragging a single row in SelectionTool
notes: Root cause: setExcluded marks all selected IDs, so snapPoint finds nothing when the row is the only element. Fix: added computeSelfGuidelines() that generates orientation guidelines (along row angle + perpendicular) and cardinal axis guidelines (horizontal + vertical) from the dragged elements themselves. Called in both showGuidelinesAtPoint (mousedown) and the dragging case (onPointerMove). Self-guidelines merge with snap-detected targets for complete guideline display. Build passes.

prompt: Do NOT display guidelines based on the cursor position
notes: Removed cardinal axis guidelines (horizontal/vertical through cursor position) from computeSelfGuidelines. The method now only generates guidelines based on element properties (row orientationAngle), not cursor coordinates. Removed the currentCenter parameter entirely.

prompt: Add guidelines when repositioning or dragging tables
notes: Added table handling to computeSelfGuidelines in SelectionTool. Tables now generate horizontal and vertical guidelines through the table center position when dragged. Build passes.

prompt: Show row guidelines (1 horizontal along row + 2 vertical at extremes) when dragging a row with SelectionTool, matching SeatPlacementTool hover behavior
notes: Updated computeSelfGuidelines in SelectionTool to produce the same guidelines as SnapEngine does for SeatPlacementTool hover: one along-row guideline through row center + two perpendicular guidelines at first and last seat positions (row extremes). Also kept area extreme row guidelines. Build passes.

prompt: Implement the following plan: Make toolbar tooltips appear immediately on hover by adding MuiTooltip defaultProps with enterDelay: 0 and enterNextDelay: 0 in the theme configuration.
notes: Added MuiTooltip defaultProps in src/ui/theme.ts with enterDelay: 0 and enterNextDelay: 0 so all tooltips appear instantly on hover.

prompt: increase the size of the seats and decrease the spacing between seats in a row
notes: Increased DEFAULT_SEAT_RADIUS from 8 to 12, decreased MIN_SEAT_SPACING from 18 to 10, DEFAULT_SEAT_SPACING from 18 to 14, tool spacing from 40 to 28 in SeatPlacementTool and GridTool, and scaled seat label fontSize from 7 to 9.

prompt: increase the spacing between seats in a row
notes: Increased seat spacing from 28 to 50 in SeatPlacementTool and GridTool (horizontal spacing).

prompt: spacing must be 35
notes: Set seat spacing to 35 in SeatPlacementTool and GridTool.

prompt: Areas (zones or shapes) must support rotation so users can change their angle after being created. Required: rotation handle, live preview, center-based rotation, undo/redo, UX consistency with rows/tables.
notes: Implemented area rotation by: (1) switching AreaShape.ts to center-based positioning with rotation applied to the Konva group, (2) making the rotation handle position in SelectionLayer.ts rotation-aware using rotation matrix math, (3) updating hitTestRotationHandle in SelectionTool.ts to match the rotated handle position, (4) hiding resize handles when an area is rotated. No changes needed to RotateElementsCommand or the data model as they already support areas.

prompt: increase the spacing between rows when use the grid row tool
notes: Increased GridTool default rowSpacing from 28 to 40 pixels for more breathing room between rows.

prompt: with the seat tool, when the user are making a row, it will show the number of seat and the angle like the grid tool.
notes: Added floating tooltip to SeatPlacementTool showing angle and seat count during row dragging. Extended preview:seats event type, computed angle via angleBetween in generateSeats(), and added tooltip rendering in PreviewLayer.showSeatPreviews().

prompt: Implement the following plan: Show angle tooltip and rotation cursor when rotating elements
notes: Added preview:rotation event, emit it during rotation drag in SelectionTool, subscribe in KonvaRenderer, added showRotationTooltip to PreviewLayer, set grabbing cursor during rotation, clear tooltip and restore cursor on rotation end/cancel.

prompt: Fix row rotation tooltip to show absolute angle instead of delta angle
notes: Modified SelectionTool.ts rotating case to compute absolute angle using orientationAngle for rows and orig.rotation for other elements before emitting preview:rotation event

prompt: Implement plan: Fix selection bounding box to rotate with the row. When a single straight row is selected, draw a rotated bounding box matching the row orientation instead of an axis-aligned one.
notes: Replaced section 7 in SelectionLayer.updateSelection() with rotated bounding box logic for single straight rows, falling back to AABB for curved rows and multi-element selections. Resets offsetX/offsetY/rotation in AABB fallback to avoid stale state.

prompt: When the user is rotating an element, the bounding box must be invisible
notes: Added toolState \!== rotating check to section 7 condition in SelectionLayer.updateSelection() so the bounding box hides during rotation, matching the existing behavior of row shadows.

prompt: Fix Row Bounding Box to Tightly Fit Curved Rows - implement plan to compute OBB for curved rows in SelectionLayer
notes: Modified SelectionLayer.ts to remove the curved-row exclusion from the rotated bounding box logic. Replaced the simple first/last seat width calculation with a full OBB computation: collects all seat positions, computes centroid, rotates positions into the row local frame using orientationAngle, computes AABB in that space, then renders the box rotated back. Works for both straight and curved rows.

prompt: Fix Curved Row Bounding Box Offset Bug - the bounding box is misaligned for highly curved (U-shaped) rows because the rendering anchor point uses the centroid instead of the actual AABB center rotated back to world space.
notes: Computed the local AABB center (localCenterX/Y), rotated it back to world space using the row orientation angle, and used the resulting worldCenterX/Y as the Konva.Rect position instead of the raw centroid (cx/cy). This fixes the mismatch between the offset assumption and the actual anchor point.

prompt: Implement plan: Fix Curved Row Hitbox to Match Visual Bounding Box — add rotated OBB hit-test in isPointInSelectionBounds for single-row selections
notes: Added rotated OBB check in isPointInSelectionBounds() in SelectionTool.ts. For single-row selections, the click point is transformed into the row local (rotated) frame and tested against the same AABB used for visual rendering. Falls back to AABB for multi-row/non-row selections.

prompt: remove the vertical green line of the rotation point. only stay the green point
notes: Removed the rotationLine (Konva.Line) from SelectionLayer that connected the element top edge to the rotation handle. Only the green circle handle remains.

prompt: Fix row selection shadow breaking for near-straight curved rows by adding ratio-based guard and using angleBetween for rect alignment
notes: Changed SelectionLayer.ts: replaced simple curveRadius>2 check with a ratio-based isEffectivelyStraight guard (sagitta/chord < 0.02), and switched straight rect shadow to use angleBetween(firstPos, lastPos) instead of row.orientationAngle for proper alignment.

prompt: Fix Undo/Redo for Row (and Element) Move - deep copy Point values in MoveElementsCommand and add spatialIndex.update in SelectionTool onPointerUp restore loop
notes: Applied two fixes: 1) Deep-copy Point values in MoveElementsCommand constructor to isolate undo/redo data from shared references. 2) Added spatialIndex.update(restored) in SelectionTool.onPointerUp restore loop to keep spatial index in sync.

prompt: Implement plan: Update Canvas Scroll/Zoom Navigation - scroll to pan, Alt+scroll to zoom
notes: Modified handleWheel() in InputManager.ts: normal scroll now pans via panBy(-deltaX, -deltaY), Alt/Option+scroll zooms at cursor via setZoomAtPoint().

prompt: Implement plan: Fix Area Resize with Rotation - remove rotation guard, position handles in rotated space, fix hit-testing, transform resize deltas to local space, store original rotation on drag start
notes: Implemented 5 changes across SelectionLayer.ts and SelectionTool.ts: (1) removed rotation guard so resize handles always show, (2) positioned resize handles using rotated corner positions, (3) fixed hit-testing to use rotated corners, (4) transformed resize drag deltas from world space to local rotated frame, (5) stored original rotation at drag start. Build passes cleanly.

prompt: Fix resize handle positions for rotated areas - handles were in wrong position
notes: Fixed showResizeHandles and hitTestResizeHandles to compute corner positions as local offsets from center (-halfW/-halfH) matching AreaShape rendering, instead of using bounds.x/y absolute coordinates.

prompt: Implement the following plan: Limit Maximum Curvature for Curved Rows - Define MAX_ROW_ARC_ANGLE constant (270°) and enforce it in seat extension preview and commit paths
notes: Added MAX_ROW_ARC_ANGLE constant to constraints.ts. Modified SelectionTool.ts to cap newSeatCount in both onPointerMove (preview) and onPointerUp (commit) so curved rows cannot exceed 270° arc angle. Added guard to skip ExtendRowCommand when no seats can be added.

prompt: Implement the Seat Picker Tool plan: create SeatPickerTool.ts, modify SelectionLayer.ts, KonvaRenderer.ts, EditorShell.tsx, Toolbar.tsx, useKeyboardShortcuts.ts, and PropertiesPanel.tsx
notes: Created SeatPickerTool with seat-only hit testing, box select, no move/resize. Modified SelectionLayer to skip row shadows, extension/curve/rotation/resize handles when seat-picker active. Passed toolId through KonvaRenderer to SelectionLayer. Registered tool, added toolbar button (Colorize icon), keyboard shortcut (P), and hid Status dropdown in PropertiesPanel for seat-picker mode. Build passes.

prompt: Sometimes, when trying to select with the picker tool some seats of a row, when hovering for one, the tool selects the next too. Ensure only the intended seat is selected.
notes: Fixed box-select in SeatPickerTool to use precise circle-rect intersection check (circleIntersectsRect) instead of relying on broadphase spatial index bounding box overlap. The spatial index queryRect returns seats whose bounding boxes overlap the selection rect, which can include neighboring seats. Added circleIntersectsRect helper to filter precisely.

prompt: Implement plan: Continue expanding straight when arc limit is reached - when extending a curved row past MAX_ROW_ARC_ANGLE, continue placing seats in a straight line tangent to the arc endpoint
notes: Modified both preview (onPointerMove) and commit (onPointerUp) paths in SelectionTool.ts to split newSeatCount into arcSeatCount and straightSeatCount. After arc seats are placed up to the 180° limit, remaining seats are placed linearly along the tangent direction (rightDir/leftDir).

prompt: Replace circular arc curvature with quadratic (parabolic) curvature across all files
notes: Replaced all arc-based math (arcFromSagitta, circular arc geometry) with parabolic curve functions (parabolaY, parabolaTangentLocal, parabolaArcLength, parabolaXAtArcLength, parabolaPositions). Updated SelectionTool.ts (computeCurvePositions, getCurvedRowTangents, extension preview/commit), SelectionLayer.ts (shadow rendering, handle positioning), ExtendRowCommand.ts, ContractRowCommand.ts to use quadratic sagitta scaling. Removed MAX_ROW_ARC_ANGLE constraint and arcFromSagitta function. Updated types.ts comment.

prompt: Implement two-phase grid creation (drag-to-define) plan: change GridTool from 3-click workflow to drag-based workflow where Phase 1 uses press-and-drag and Phase 2 uses mouse movement + click to confirm.
notes: Replaced origin-set/width-defined states with dragging/rows-pending states. onPointerDown from idle/preview transitions to dragging. onPointerUp from dragging locks the row (rows-pending) or cancels if drag too short. onPointerDown from rows-pending commits. All preview/generation methods reused unchanged.

prompt: Fix broken shadow on expanded curved rows - shadow and seats on different parabolas after extension
notes: Root cause: extension placed seats on old parabola domain but recalculated sagitta for new chord, creating mismatched curves. Fix: after computing new sagitta in ExtendRowCommand and ContractRowCommand, reposition ALL seats onto the new parabola via parabolaPositions(). Added originalSeatPositions map for proper undo/redo of seat positions.

prompt: Fix Bounding Box in Seat Picker Tool for Same-Row Selections - add isSeatPicker guard to skip rotated single-row bounding box logic
notes: Added && \!isSeatPicker condition to the selectedRowIds.size === 1 check in SelectionLayer.ts line 292, so seat-picker mode always uses the AABB fallback that correctly iterates only over selectedIds.

prompt: Fix curved row instability after expansion and implement automatic straight snapping when curvature becomes very small
notes: Two fixes: (1) After ExtendRowCommand/ContractRowCommand, re-select the row with updated seatIds so new seats are included in the selection — fixes broken repositioning after expansion. (2) Added CURVATURE_EPSILON=3 constant, replaced all hardcoded threshold-2 checks. Snap curveRadius to 0 during live preview and commit when abs(sagitta) < epsilon. Ensures consistent straight behavior across computeCurvePositions, getCurvedRowTangents, shadow rendering, handle positioning, and extend/contract commands. Undo correctly restores original curvature state.

prompt: Synchronize straight snapping between row shadow and seats. Problem: when curvature approaches zero the row shadow snaps to straight first while seats remain slightly curved; both must remain synchronized.
notes: Added isRowCurvatureEffectivelyStraight(sagitta, chord) in constraints.ts. SelectionLayer uses it for row shadow and extend-handle curved vs straight. SelectionTool uses it in computeCurvePositions, curving preview, curving commit, and getCurvedRowTangents. ContractRowCommand and ExtendRowCommand use it when computing newCurveRadius and deciding parabola vs linear. Single canonical straight rule everywhere.

prompt: Fix row angle desync after curvature edits and straightening. Implement the plan: sync orientationAngle from first-to-last seat positions in CurveRowCommand, ExtendRowCommand, and ContractRowCommand.
notes: Added angleBetween import and orientationAngle sync in CurveRowCommand.applyCurve(), ExtendRowCommand.execute(), and ContractRowCommand.execute() so row angle matches visual geometry after curve/extend/contract; rotation to 0° now aligns row visually.

prompt: Remove the X and Y position indicators from the footer UI. Requirement: The footer currently displays coordinate indicators showing X position and Y position. These indicators must be completely removed from the interface.
notes: Removed X/Y coordinate display and mouseWorldX/mouseWorldY subscriptions from StatusBar (src/ui/components/StatusBar/StatusBar.tsx). Footer now shows only tool state, element counts, and zoom.

prompt: Display "Mixed" category when selecting rows or tables that contain seats with different categories using the Select Tool. Problem: Seat Picker shows Mixed correctly but Selection Tool did not. Required: when selecting a row or table with the Selection Tool, evaluate categories of all contained seats and show Mixed when they differ.
notes: Updated PropertiesPanel multiSelectInfo to collect categories from contained seats (seatIds) for rows and tables instead of row/table category field; empty seatIds fallback to row/table category. Selection Tool now shows Mixed when seats have different categories, matching Seat Picker behavior.

prompt: when i have a single row with different categories of seat, the new implementation doesnt work
notes: Single row/table selection was not using multiSelectInfo (that path only runs when selectionCount > 1). Updated RowProperties and TableProperties to derive category from contained seats via useMemo and show Mixed with colored dots when seats have different categories; same display pattern as multi-select.

prompt: Implement a subtle visual label for rows that displays the row label next to the first seat of each row. Additionally, update seat labeling behavior: row label positioning near first seat, transform awareness (rotation, curvature), curved row tangent alignment, rotation handling, seat labels show only seat ID, subtle visual behavior, real-time performance, and edge case handling.
notes: Added seatDisplayLabel() to labels.ts for extracting seat numbers. Updated SeatShape.ts to display only seat numbers (e.g. 1, 2, 3 instead of A-1, A-2, A-3). Expanded RowShape.ts with Konva.Text row label positioned near first seat using parabola tangent for curved rows, angle normalization to prevent upside-down text, and subtle styling (opacity 0.55, fontSize 10, bold #555). Added elementGetter to ElementLayer for cross-element seat lookups, wired via KonvaRenderer. Handles single-seat rows, straight-snapping, high curvature, and 180+ degree rotation.

prompt: the seat labels and row labels always must be in the standard direction, not with angle
notes: Removed rotation from row labels (RowShape.ts) - labels always render at 0 degrees. Added counter-rotation to seat labels (SeatShape.ts) so they stay upright regardless of seat group rotation. Both label types now always display in standard horizontal orientation.

prompt: the individual seats must have his own label, must be S, so when the user add a individual seat, must be S-1, S-2, etc
notes: Updated SeatShape.ts to only strip the row prefix (seatDisplayLabel) for seats belonging to a row (rowId !== null). Standalone seats now display their full label (e.g. S-1, S-2).

prompt: the individual seat must have the unique count of seat, so if you have 5 seats in a row, when i add a individual seat, must show S-1, no S-6
notes: Added standalone seat counter (standaloneSeatCounter) to PlacementSystem. Individual seats now use their own independent numbering (S-1, S-2, ...) instead of using the total engine element count which was mixing row seats into the count.

prompt: Implement consistent seat numbering continuity between rows that share the same row label. Multiple rows with same label must have continuous seat numbering.
notes: Added renumberLabelGroup() to RowGroupingSystem that finds all rows sharing a label, sorts them spatially (top-to-bottom, left-to-right), and assigns continuous seat numbers using startIndex offset in propagateRowLabel. Updated propagateLabel to renumber both old and new label groups when a row label changes. Updated UpdatePropertiesCommand to trigger group renumbering on row label change (with undo/redo support). Updated ExtendRowCommand and ContractRowCommand to use group renumbering instead of single-row propagateRowLabel. Removed redundant propagateLabel call from PropertiesPanel since UpdatePropertiesCommand now handles it.

prompt: the row that changed the label must continue the cont of id, not the first row
notes: Added optional changedRowId parameter to renumberLabelGroup and getRowsByLabel. When provided, the changed row is sorted last so existing rows keep their numbering and the newcomer continues from where they left off. Updated UpdatePropertiesCommand and propagateLabel to pass the changed row ID.

prompt: A row must have a label, So when the user want to edit the exists label form a row, the input need to highlight the text before the user text. The user cant delete the label and confirm the input, must have a label. So, if the user text a empty label, the element should restore to the last valid label
notes: Refactored RowProperties label TextField to use local state. Added onFocus with inputRef.select() to highlight text on edit. Added onBlur validation: if empty/whitespace-only, restore to last valid label (data.label); otherwise commit via onChange. Added helperText and error styling when label is empty during editing.

prompt: when the user input a label and then click the map or other section, not the rigth sidebar, the input dont consider on Blur and dont update the label
notes: Selection change unmounts RowProperties/AreaProperties before input onBlur runs. Added optional elementId to handleChange. RowProperties and AreaProperties now commit pending label on unmount via useEffect cleanup (using ref for current localLabel and UpdatePropertiesCommand for the specific element id). AreaProperties got same unmount-commit for label.

prompt: if you select a row, user must have an option in porperties to the oreder of the row labels ( 1...10 or 10 ...1) this change the position of the row label also
notes: Added Seat order dropdown in RowProperties (1→10 and 10→1). RowGroupingSystem.renumberLabelGroup now respects seatOrderDirection: right-to-left reverses labels so seat 1 is at opposite end. ElementLayer.buildRowLabelInfo uses firstIndex/lastIndex from direction so row label is always next to seat 1. UpdatePropertiesCommand renumbers label group when seatOrderDirection changes. Row label position moves with seat 1.

prompt: Seat order display-only: changing seat order (1→10 / 10→1) should not change seat label IDs, only move the row label position. Two rows sharing a label must not have their numbers reshuffled.
notes: Removed seatOrderDirection renumbering from UpdatePropertiesCommand (no more renumberLabelGroup call on direction change). Removed per-row label reversal in RowGroupingSystem.renumberLabelGroup (always assigns labels[i] to seatIds[i] in order). Added seatNumberFromLabel helper to labels.ts. Updated ElementLayer.buildRowLabelInfo to find the seat with min/max number and position the row label next to the min-number seat (left-to-right) or max-number seat (right-to-left). Seat labels are now stable; only the row label visual position changes.

prompt: remove from individual seat the status propertie
notes: Made Seat.status optional in types.ts. PlacementSystem creates seats without status and only sets status when seat is assigned to a row. PropertiesPanel shows Status dropdown only for seats in a row or table (rowId or tableId non-null), not for individual seats. Build passes.

prompt: remove price form seat/rows
notes: Removed price from Row interface in types.ts. Removed price: 0 from row creation in RowGroupingSystem.detectRow(). Removed Price number input from RowProperties in PropertiesPanel.tsx. Seat type had no price; only rows had it. Build passes.

prompt: dont change the position of the label when the user change the seat order, alway show the label int the left extreme of the row
notes: Rewrote buildRowLabelInfo in ElementLayer.ts to always place row label at the leftmost seat (smallest x, then smallest y for ties). Removed all seatOrderDirection and seat-number-based logic from label positioning. Removed unused seatNumberFromLabel import. Seat display order (1→10 / 10→1) still works via getSeatDisplayLabel; only the row label position is now fixed at the left extreme.

prompt: remplace the seat picker tool icon for this svg: (custom SVG with circles, arc, center dot, cursor pointer)
notes: Replaced ColorizeIcon with custom SeatPickerIcon in Toolbar.tsx: added SvgIcon-based component with user-provided SVG (viewBox 0 0 128 128, strokes/fills #2b2b2b). Removed ColorizeIcon import.

prompt: make it bigger
notes: Increased Seat Picker toolbar icon size to 28px via sx={{ fontSize: 28 }}.

prompt: ambia el orden de las tools: deben ser select, seat, grid, table, are, seat picker, and pan
notes: Reordered toolbar ToggleButtons in Toolbar.tsx to: selection, seat-placement, grid, table, area, seat-picker, pan.

prompt: now the properties inputs confirm on blur, add enter confirm also
notes: Added onKeyDown (Enter) to Row label and Area label TextFields in PropertiesPanel; Enter runs same confirm logic as onBlur and blurs the input.

prompt: Implement angle snapping for rotation controls: hard snapping to cardinal angles (0/90/180/270) within 5° threshold, soft snapping to integer degrees for all others. Changes across math.ts, SelectionTool.ts, and RotateElementsCommand.ts.
notes: Added degToRad, radToDeg, snapAngleDeg utilities to math.ts. Added computeSnappedDelta helper to SelectionTool and integrated it into onPointerMove and onPointerUp rotating cases. Normalized stored rotation and orientationAngle values in RotateElementsCommand.applyRotation through snapAngleDeg. Tightened commit threshold from 0.01 to 0.001.

prompt: When an element is created, its rotation angle must be correctly initialized and stored at creation time. Rows must have transform.rotation match orientationAngle. Curve/extend/contract operations must sync transform.rotation with recalculated orientationAngle.
notes: Set transform.rotation = orientationAngle in RowGroupingSystem.detectRow() at creation. Synced transform.rotation with orientationAngle in CurveRowCommand.applyCurve(), ExtendRowCommand.execute(), and ContractRowCommand.execute(). This ensures rotation editing always works relative to the real creation angle, not a default zero-based rotation.

prompt: Implement the following plan: Fix Rotation Initialization Bug for Overlapping Rows
notes: Added rotationPrimaryId field to SelectionTool to resolve the correct primary element (row/table instead of seat) for rotation snapping calculations. The field is set in setupRotation(), used in computeSnappedDelta(), and cleared in both cleanupInteractionState() and cancel().

prompt: Implement the following plan: Table Label Management (Propagation, Uniqueness, Undo/Redo) - Add table label propagation in UpdatePropertiesCommand, isTableLabelTaken helper, and rewrite TableProperties UI with validation
notes: Implemented 3 changes: (1) UpdatePropertiesCommand now propagates label changes to child seats via propagateRowLabel when a table label changes, (2) Added isTableLabelTaken() method on EditorEngine for uniqueness checks, (3) Rewrote TableProperties UI with local state, blur/Enter confirmation, duplicate/empty validation with error messages, and unmount cleanup. Undo/redo works automatically through applyProps.

prompt: Implement automatic label deduplication on element creation — add nextAvailableRowLabel, nextAvailableTableLabel, nextAvailableStandaloneSeatLabel helpers to EditorEngine and wire them into RowGroupingSystem.detectRow(), TableTool.placeTable(), and PlacementSystem.placeSeats().
notes: Added 3 label-availability helpers to EditorEngine that scan existing elements to find the next unused label. Updated RowGroupingSystem, TableTool, and PlacementSystem to use them instead of blind counters. No undo/redo changes needed.

prompt: when user delete a B element, the system dont recycled the B element label in the next one
notes: Fixed label recycling by changing nextAvailable* calls to always scan from 0/1 instead of from the current counter. The counter was causing the scan to skip over freed labels from deleted elements.

prompt: Fix the labeling behavior when creating multiple rows using the Grid Tool. When the Grid Tool generates several rows at the same time, each row must follow the correct label sequence automatically, filling unused labels in global order (e.g. only B exists, create 3 rows → A, C, D).
notes: Added nextAvailableRowLabels(count) batch method to EditorEngine that builds a Set of taken labels in one pass and returns the first N unused in global sequence. Added optional overrideLabel parameter to RowGroupingSystem.detectRow to skip per-row label lookup. Updated PlacementSystem.placeGrid to pre-reserve labels for the batch and pass them into detectRow, eliminating duplicate label assignment. Build passes with no errors.

prompt: Implement configurable table seat count from Properties Panel - full plan with ChangeTableSeatCountCommand, CompoundCommand, constraints, PropertiesPanel UI (single + multi-table), and default seat count update
notes: Created ChangeTableSeatCountCommand.ts and CompoundCommand.ts. Added MIN/MAX/DEFAULT_SEATS_PER_TABLE constants to constraints.ts. Updated TableTool to use DEFAULT_SEATS_PER_TABLE (6). Replaced read-only seat count Typography with editable TextField in TableProperties. Added BulkSeatCountField component for multi-table seat count editing. Build passes.

prompt: al expandir una row con curva, esta debe mantener su angulo, su forma y la funcion utilizada para calcular la curva nada mas que un lado va a tener que ser mas largo que otro, pero el centro sigue siendo el mismo. Lo mismo al momento de contraer una row curvada
notes: Implemented CurveDefinition data model (chord, center, angle) to preserve parabola shape during extend/contract. Removed quadratic sagitta rescaling from ExtendRowCommand and ContractRowCommand. Updated SelectionTool, SelectionLayer, RowShape to use curveDefinition for asymmetric curve support. Added math helpers worldToParabolaLocalX, parabolaLocalToWorld, curveDefinitionFromEndpoints. Updated MoveElementsCommand and RotateElementsCommand to translate/rotate curveDefinition.

prompt: Ensure the application cursor is always visible and dark, regardless of the browser or operating system default cursor behavior.
notes: Created src/utils/cursors.ts with dark SVG data-URI cursors for all interaction types (default, pointer, grab, grabbing, crosshair, nwse-resize, nesw-resize). Integrated via engineBridge.ts (cursor:changed events) and SelectionLayer.ts (direct body cursor assignments). All cursors use #222 fill with white stroke outline for guaranteed visibility on light backgrounds, with CSS keyword fallbacks.

prompt: when the user hover over other section, not the map, must show custom select cursor
notes: Exported DARK_DEFAULT_CURSOR from cursors.ts and applied it globally via document.body.style.cursor in EditorShell useEffect. This ensures all non-canvas sections (toolbar, properties panel, status bar, dialogs) display the dark custom cursor.

prompt: Use user-provided SVGs (cursor.svg, screenshotselection.svg, openhand.svg, closedhand.svg) as application cursors
notes: Replaced all custom SVG cursors in src/utils/cursors.ts with user-provided assets: cursor.svg for default/pointer, screenshotselection.svg for crosshair, openhand.svg for grab, closedhand.svg for grabbing. Cleaned SVGs by stripping XML declarations, DOCTYPE, and redundant clip-paths for data-URI compatibility. Kept existing resize cursors unchanged (no user SVG provided). Updated hotspot coordinates to match new SVG geometries.

prompt: Use pointinghand.svg as pointer cursor on the app
notes: Added pointinghand.svg (cleaned for data-URI) as the pointer cursor in src/utils/cursors.ts, replacing the previous fallback to the default arrow. Hotspot set at (14,9) near the fingertip.

prompt: add the custom cursor select in the map
notes: Fixed the canvas not showing the custom cursor on initial load. The Zustand store cursor was initialized to the raw string "default" instead of the custom SVG cursor value. Changed the initial value to DARK_DEFAULT_CURSOR in useEditorStore.ts.

prompt: when the user change the number of seats of a table, if click in the map to onBlur the input, the input doesnt confirm it
notes: Added document.activeElement.blur() in InputManager.handlePointerDown so that clicking on the canvas blurs focused inputs, triggering their onBlur commit handlers (e.g. seat count changes).

prompt: Implement the following plan: Instant Import/Export JSON (No Dialogs) - Export: Click button → JSON file downloads immediately (no dialog). Import: Click button → Native file browser opens immediately (no dialog).
notes: Removed ExportDialog and ImportDialog components. Refactored EditorShell to handle export via direct blob download and import via hidden file input. Deleted ExportDialog.tsx and ImportDialog.tsx.

prompt: if the input file is not a json or a valid json, must show an alert saying it
notes: Added file extension check before reading - alerts if file does not end in .json. Invalid JSON content was already handled by the existing try/catch around deserializeLayout.

prompt: when a curved row is rotated, the row label dont follow the left extreme of the row
notes: Fixed buildRowLabelInfo() in ElementLayer.ts to use the first/last seats from the row seatIds sequence order instead of finding leftmost/rightmost by global x-coordinate. The global coordinate approach breaks after rotation because the globally leftmost seat is no longer the rows first seat.

prompt: Fix the seat ID sequencing bug that occurs when rows sharing the same label were originally created using the Grid Tool. The issue appears when the first row with a given label was generated through the Grid Tool instead of being created individually. Previously existing rows must never change their seat IDs.
notes: Fixed getRowsByLabel() in RowGroupingSystem.ts to sort non-changed rows by their current minimum seat number instead of spatial position. This preserves established numbering order when a new row joins the label group, preventing existing rows from being reordered. Added getMinSeatNumber() helper method and imported seatNumberFromLabel.

prompt: Add rotation snapping when creating rows using the Seat Tool or the Grid Tool. Currently, when creating a row and adjusting its angle during creation, the resulting rotation may contain decimal values. Rotation snapping must also apply during the creation phase with hard snap to key angles (0/45/90/135/180/225/270/315) and soft snap to integers.
notes: Updated snapAngleDeg to include 45-degree increments in hard snap angles. Added snapAngleRad helper. Applied angle snapping in SeatPlacementTool.generateSeats() and GridTool.updateFirstRowPreview() by computing snapped endpoints before seat generation.

prompt: Fix the multi-selection rotation behavior so that group rotation always starts from 0°, without modifying the individual base rotations of the selected elements.
notes: Modified computeSnappedDelta() in SelectionTool.ts to treat multi-selection rotation as a pure delta starting from 0° instead of using the primary element absolute rotation. Updated tooltip to show delta angle for multi-selection.

prompt: Fix single row rotation always starting at 0 degrees after multi-selection rotation fix
notes: Changed multi-selection detection from counting selected IDs to counting distinct top-level entities (rows/tables/standalone elements). A row with its seats counts as 1 entity, so single-row rotation correctly uses absolute angle.

prompt: when the user focus to config the mount of seat of a table, the text of the input must highlight
notes: Added onFocus handler with e.target.select() to both the single-table and bulk-edit seat count TextField components in PropertiesPanel.tsx, so the input text is highlighted/selected when focused.

prompt: Fix: Input text highlight on focus not working in Safari. Change seat count inputs from type=number to type=text with numeric inputMode, and wrap all select() calls in requestAnimationFrame for Safari compatibility.
notes: Updated 5 inputs in PropertiesPanel.tsx: (1) wrapped all 5 select() calls in requestAnimationFrame to fix Safari clearing selection after focus, (2) changed 2 seat count inputs from type=number to type=text with inputMode=numeric and pattern=[0-9]* since Safari select() does not work on number inputs.

prompt: Implement the following plan: Add Drag & Drop JSON Import - Add HTML5 drag-and-drop event handlers to EditorShell.tsx, reuse existing deserializeLayout + engine.loadLayout logic, add visual overlay feedback.
notes: Extracted shared importFile() function from handleFileImport, added isDragOver state with dragCounter ref for correct enter/leave tracking, added drag-and-drop handlers (onDragOver, onDragEnter, onDragLeave, onDrop) to root Box, added full-screen overlay with dashed border when dragging. Existing Import JSON button still works.

prompt:
Implement the following plan:

# Change default export filename to Seat_Map

## Context
The default layout name is `"Untitled Map"`, which produces `Untitled_Map.json` on export. The user wants the default export filename to be `Seat_Map.json`.

## Change
**File:** `src/engine/state/EditorState.ts` (line 11)
- Change `name: 'Untitled Map'` → `name: 'Seat Map'`
notes: Changed default layout name from 'Untitled Map' to 'Seat Map' in EditorState.ts so the export filename becomes Seat_Map.json.

prompt: Fix the labeling issue when creating rows using the Grid Tool where each generated row contains only one seat. Currently, when a grid creates rows composed of a single seat, those rows are not assigned a row ID or label.
notes: Fixed two guard clauses: RowGroupingSystem.detectRow() rejected rows with <2 seats (changed to <1), and PlacementSystem.placeGrid() excluded single-seat rows from label reservation and override label assignment (changed >= 2 thresholds to >= 1). Also handled orientationAngle for single-seat rows (defaults to 0).

prompt: Context: The seat map editor currently hardcodes exactly 3 categories (planta1, planta2, vip) as TypeScript union types with fixed colors. Users need the ability to create/delete custom categories dynamically, with full integration into selection, rendering, properties, serialization, and undo/redo. Strategy: Default category IDs stay the same; categories become first-class objects in EditorState; SeatCategory/RowCategory replaced with CategoryId; schema v2 with v1 migration. Implement: domain categories.ts + types.ts, EditorState categories map + CRUD, events + engine API, AddCategoryCommand/DeleteCategoryCommand/ChangeCategoryCommand, color registry + KonvaRenderer subscription, serialization v2 + EditorShell, Zustand + engineBridge, CategoryManager UI, PropertiesPanel dynamic dropdowns, DEFAULT_CATEGORY_ID everywhere, type cleanup.
notes: Implemented full dynamic categories: new src/domain/categories.ts (CategoryId, Category, DEFAULT_CATEGORIES, generateCategoryId); types use CategoryId; EditorState has categories Map + CRUD; categories:changed event; engine getCategories/getCategory/getCategoryColor/isCategoryInUse/isCategoryNameTaken; Add/Delete/ChangeCategoryCommand; color.ts registry + setCategoryRegistry; KonvaRenderer syncs on categories:changed; serialization v2 with categories array, v1 files get DEFAULT_CATEGORIES; EditorShell export/import pass categories; store + bridge; CategoryManager panel; PropertiesPanel reads categories from store, dynamic menu items; DEFAULT_CATEGORY_ID in PlacementSystem, RowGroupingSystem, TableTool, ChangeTableSeatCountCommand. Build passes.

prompt: cuando abro el input de add category el sidebar aumenta un poco de tamaño, no deberia hacer eso
notes: Fixed sidebar width: added width: 260, minWidth: 260, flexShrink: 0, overflow: hidden to the right panel Box in EditorShell; added minWidth: 0 to CategoryManager collapse content so the sidebar stays 260px when Add Category form opens.
